name: evient-automation
description: Standalone Appium automation workspace for EViENT mobile testing

scripts.test:auth: npm run appium:setup && wdio run ./wdio.appium.conf.cjs --suite auth
scripts.test:auth:empty-email: npm run appium:setup && wdio run ./wdio.appium.conf.cjs --suite auth --mochaOpts.grep AUTH-01
scripts.test:auth:empty-password: npm run appium:setup && wdio run ./wdio.appium.conf.cjs --suite auth --mochaOpts.grep AUTH-02
scripts.test:auth:wrong-password: npm run appium:setup && wdio run ./wdio.appium.conf.cjs --suite auth --mochaOpts.grep AUTH-03
scripts.test:auth:empty-full-name: npm run appium:setup && wdio run ./wdio.appium.conf.cjs --suite auth --mochaOpts.grep AUTH-04
scripts.test:auth:duplicate-email: npm run appium:setup && wdio run ./wdio.appium.conf.cjs --suite auth --mochaOpts.grep AUTH-05
scripts.test:auth:wrong-otp: npm run appium:setup && wdio run ./wdio.appium.conf.cjs --suite auth --mochaOpts.grep AUTH-06
scripts.test:auth:register-success: npm run appium:setup && wdio run ./wdio.appium.conf.cjs --suite auth --mochaOpts.grep AUTH-07
scripts.test:auth:login-success: npm run appium:setup && wdio run ./wdio.appium.conf.cjs --suite auth --mochaOpts.grep AUTH-08
scripts.test:admin: npm run appium:setup && wdio run ./wdio.appium.conf.cjs --suite admin
scripts.test:appium: npm run appium:setup && wdio run ./wdio.appium.conf.cjs --suite all
